programme.title: Nova: Bigger Than T.Rex
programme.desc: Almost a century ago, paleontologists found fossil bones from a dinosaur that was bigger than Tyrannosaurus rex. New bones in Morocco have reopened the investigation into this epic beast. Paleontologists reconstruct the carnivore.

programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Valley of the Banished
programme.desc: Survivalists enter a punishing African location where tribes in the area lived by a simple principle: banish the weak. As the 40-day challenge begins, deadly crocodiles and territorial leopards circle. A survivalist is quickly targeted for banishment.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: Croc Shock
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: Survivalists try to hunt while being hunted themselves. The group fends off a night attack by aggressive crocodiles. A tumultuous team leads to the first self-banishment of the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: The Barehanded Killer
programme.desc: After self-banishing, Kate is slammed by Africa's wrath. Desperately hungry, Bulent gets a major score with his bare hands but Makani must put aside her vegan beliefs. Wes and Gwen's first big food win goes wrong, threatening their health and challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Foreign Exchange: Taking on Colombia
programme.desc: European survivalists Marie and Olivier are dropped into the Colombian jungle and face a punishing 21-day challenge. Aggressive caiman, insects and extreme temperatures test their physical and mental resolve. Their journey is translated into English.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bite Club
programme.desc: A survivor of rattlesnake, shark and bear attacks teams with Brooke, wife of 'Naked and Afraid' veteran Matt Wright, in a vicious African feeding ground. Then, a haunted Colombian jungle tests survivalists with threats from predators and the supernatural.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: New Evidence
programme.desc: Researchers turn to science to test theories that methane bubbles, rogue waves or lightning could be responsible for the mysteries surrounding the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle Exposed
programme.desc: Examine what's beneath the surface of the Bermuda Triangle's 440,000 square miles of ocean. The Triangle's freak waves, magnetic anomalies and giant whirlpools have been blamed for mysterious disappearances for decades.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: When JJ and Precious bring all of Memphis with them to OKC for two nights of racing, everyone in the 405 has to step up and get ready to lay it all on the line. Doc looks for redemption after losing Chief's shoes to JJ.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Wild Horses
programme.desc: When JJ and his racers from Memphis come to OKC for two nights of racing, everyone in the 405 has to step up and get ready to lay it all on the line. But, after flagging and technicalities cause drama, the 405 has to fight for every win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Can't You Hear Me Knocking
programme.desc: Now that Chief is back on the list, he and Shawn map out a plan to get themselves back into the top spots. Farmtruck sets AZN up with a race against a doctor with a super car, and at race night, Doc seems like he finally has his car figured out.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Time is on My Side
programme.desc: With only a few list races left, everyone gets serious about moving up the list. AZN gets a new tune for the Dung Beetle and tests out the improvements. On race night, when Doc gets into trouble, Chief pounces on his chance to make big moves up the list.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Street Fightin' Man
programme.desc: It's the last list race of the season, and everyone in the 405 is looking to make one more move towards the top. Then, on race night, some of the top guys don't bring their cars, and plans to move up the list blow up in Doc's and Chief's faces.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Paint it Black
programme.desc: JJ 'Da Boss' from Memphis comes to OKC to host a race, everyone who's anyone in street racing shows up to compete.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Beast of Burden
programme.desc: With JJ going back to old school rules and a total of $60,000 on the line, the racers do anything and everything to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Beat Me in St. Louis
programme.desc: The MSO heads to St. Louis to race the slick streets against a team of even slicker racers led by Dynamite Dave. Memphis came out on top the last time these teams faced off, now the St. Louis crew is ready to even the score on their home turf.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Going the Distance
programme.desc: Two couples may finally meet for the first time. Sean lands in Haiti to potentially meet his love Abby, Paul embarks on a two-day boat trip down the Amazon in hopes that Karine will actually show up, and Darcey encounters airport mishaps in Amsterdam.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Language of Love
programme.desc: Darcey and Jesse spend their first day together in Amsterdam. Paul worries he is getting stood up in Brazil. Cortney prepares to meet a Spanish model she has only ever texted. Sean tries to put his doubts aside while spending time with Abby.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Ripped Apart
programme.desc: As the wedding approaches, Tiffany's son Daniel expresses doubts about South Africa. Sumit is summoned home by his parents. Paul and Karine embark on a daunting journey up the Amazon. Jihoon's proposal backfires, and Evelin is over Corey's attitude.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Rolling the Dice
programme.desc: Ronald has to confront his demons. Laura's new sex toy offends Aladin. Corey and Evelin have a very different vision for their future. Paul faces Karine's parents with upsetting news, while Sumit leaves Jenny to go home to his parents.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Blind Trust
programme.desc: Tiffany's big day has arrived but Ronald's sobriety is on her mind. Deavan breaks some unfortunate news to Jihoon. Laura is seeing another side of Aladin. Paul discovers that Karine is talking to anther man. Corey is forced to face his past with Evelin.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Baby, Come Back
programme.desc: Jenny goes out at night without Sumit. Deavan doubts Jihoon is responsible enough to support their family. Tiffany and Ronald go apartment shopping and worry about safety. Karine is concerned that Paul can't financially take care of her and the baby.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Breaking Point
programme.desc: After Sumit returns home to Jenny they get a huge surprise. Karine has reached her breaking point. Corey discovers even more about Evelin's past. Deavan questions if Jihoon can support their family, while Laura is feeling homesick in Qatar.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: The Great Unknown
programme.desc: Tiffany and Ronald surprise everyone with big news. Laura pleads with her son to come to her wedding. Deavan leaves for South Korea, but worries Jihoon isn't prepared. Corey asks Evelin to cut off her ex, while Karina and her mom leave Paul behind.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Walking a Tight Rope
programme.desc: Deavan's arrival in South Korea is not as she expected. Ronald's gambling addiction causes issues with Tiffany. Paul tries to get back in Karine's good graces before she goes into labour. Corey receives shocking news. Jenny's daughter confronts Sumit.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Fool's gold
programme.desc: Jihoon reveals a huge secret about his past to Deavan. Jenny and Sumit's relationship reaches a boiling point. Paul and Karine become parents. Tensions build when Laura's son arrives in Tunisia and meets Aladin.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Jenny is devastated when she hears shocking news about Sumit. Laura is torn between Liam and Aladin. Corey is conflicted about returning to Evelin in Ecuador. Paul's mother arrives in Brazil. Tiffany is worried about giving birth in South Africa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Torn
programme.desc: Sumit reveals his truth. Deavan discovers more troubling information about Jihoon's past. Corey returns to Ecuador with less than a month on his visa to convince Evelin to wed. Liam gives Aladin an ultimatum.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Falling Apart
programme.desc: Jenny and Sumit face each for the first time since she found out he's married. The issues between Laura, her son, and Aladin come to a head. Paul's Mom gives him a wake-up call. Tiffany makes a difficult decision for her family.

programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a Russian thanksgiving, feel the wrath of some 'teeny meanies' and plug in with 'virtual retirement.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Barnes

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Gene Simmons
programme.desc: Rock Icon and KISS Frontman Gene Simmons joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to find out what happens when you 'call Dr. Love', salute the fans in 'too ready to rock', and spit hot fire in 'demon's breath'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Floyd Mayweather
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather visits the Ridiculousness studio where Rob shows him what a Pain Face looks like. They'll also endure some Romantic Injuries and learn How Not To Train.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXIV
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Chanel look at people who lied on the resume, others who are completely tone dead, and serious sticklers that are complete rule tools.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chain Smokers
programme.desc: Grammy Award-winning duo, The Chainsmokers, join Rob, Chanel and Steelo to cringe at some biters, ride stolen mattresses and marvel at the magic of real life teleporters.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Eddie Huang
programme.desc: Restaurateur Eddie Huang picks through some 'Hot Trash,' explains to Rob what it means to be 'Fresh Off the Boat,' and enjoys drivers even worse than Eddie in 'Suspend Yourself.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Laurie Hernandez
programme.desc: Gymnastics Champion Laurie Hernandez joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to talk about her finely tuned Slamdar, the difference between her and Street Gymnasts, as well as some kids who are nothing but Angst Holes.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXV
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo pick up a few 'aggressive hitchhikers', wrestle with their 'inner demons', and beg our viewers to 'drop the camera'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub
programme.desc: The hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Dillon Francis

programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge

programme.title: Futurama: The Sting

programme.title: Futurama: The Farnsworth Parabox

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Purple Testament

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Passage on the Lady Anne
programme.desc: A couple books a passage on a luxury liner to save their marriage but are amiss onboard.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Bard

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Perchance to Dream
programme.desc: A man has a recurring nightmare of a gorgeous woman luring him to death's bed.

programme.title: Movie: Need for Speed

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Halfway into their five-year mission to explore uncharted space, the USS Enterprise is attacked by a mysterious new enemy. Escaping to the planet below, Kirk must join a stranger in fighting an impressive foe so that he can save his friends and home.

programme.title: Home Town: Sweet Home Laurel

programme.title: Home Town: Home Away From Home
programme.desc: A couple wants a vacation home that's big enough to entertain but manageable to maintain. After showing them a 1920s cottage and a 1912 Craftsman, Ben and Erin create the perfect getaway for them with a large chef's kitchen.

programme.desc: After spending a few years in the U.S., a Bahamian couple has realized that they miss the islands. Returning to Nassau doesn't feel right, so they're looking to move to laid-back Eleuthera. They have big plans and want a big home to accommodate them.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Turn Key in Treasure Cay

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Can Big Budget Buy Elusive French Country in Waco?

programme.desc: Jeff and Sara Jones are Baylor sweethearts and newlyweds, returning to Waco to find a house where they can settle down and one day raise a family. Their all-in budget is $235,000, and they're hoping to find a house with three bedrooms.

programme.desc: Danny disobeys a direct order from Captain Mark when he decides to give a love poem to a charter guest. Julia calls her boyfriend in England, while Bobby's feelings for her grow stronger. Ben and Hannah's work relationship has reached smooth sailing.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: My Big Fat Greek Threesome

programme.desc: The crew must provide a romantic trip for new guests celebrating their seven-month dating anniversary. Bobby gets the green light to go after Julia, while Tiffany and Bryan get cozy in the hot tub. Meanwhile, Ben takes Hannah on a date.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's Got Game?

programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Devil Wears Sneakers
programme.desc: A tight-knit Illinois farming town is rocked when a family of five is found beaten to death in their home. When the bodies of the Gee family are discovered, the tiny town of Beason, IL finds itself in the midst of a gruesome murder mystery.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Fear Travels Fast
programme.desc: Aurora, Indiana hadn't seen a murder in decades until Leigh Jennings was killed in her own home. Residents are horrified when the beloved mother and hairstylist is found dead. In a case where everyone liked the victim, anyone could be the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Scared Silent
programme.desc: When Marshall Dent goes missing on Christmas Eve, the Native American community of Shawnee, Oklahoma bands together. After weeks of searching, Marshall is found in a shallow grave on sacred ground, leaving authorities scrambling to find the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Nazi Killer Magic
programme.desc: It is the great untold story of World War Two. The role the Occult played in shaping and determining the outcome of the fight. Nazi Killer Magic reveals how esotericism and mysticism influenced Hitler's wartime commanders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Weaponology: SAS
programme.desc: The SAS go behind enemy lines and have revolutionised the global war on terrorism.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Wedding
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders get ready for a farm wedding by building a barnwood dance floor, a timber-frame photo booth and an incredible handcrafted wedding arbor.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Season Nine Recap
programme.desc: In another incredible season of Barnwood Builders, the guys taught pioneer skills to a new generation, built their biggest building ever, and met incredible craftspeople along the way.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Modern Mansion Makeover
programme.desc: The builders give a modern mansion a complete log cabin makeover. They use log skins and a stacked log entryway. The pressure's on as the home will be the centerpiece of an entire log cabin community. Mark also tours a restored pioneer cabin.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Gold Mine
programme.desc: The builders salvage a variety of barnwood off an Ohio barn, but to save it all, they have to deal with a dangerous roof. Mark finds a flooring company with a new idea for old wood and later visits an incredible timber frame home.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: With three kids and one more on the way, busy parents Matt and Sue have let their bungalow fall into disrepair. Covered in fungus and hidden by overgrown plants, Chris and Sarah overhaul the house hoping to get it back on par with the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach Bunks
programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Waterpark Wonderland
programme.desc: Pool genius Lucas transforms a neglected backyard into a waterpark wonderland. With his most extreme remodel yet, Lucas creates a family fun zone, complete with waterslide and double decker outdoor party space. But it's not all fun 'n games.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Strawberry to Silver Dollar
programme.desc: The Brandywine Strawberry Festival in Pennsylvania is home to 'The Colossalo,' a crab cake/roast beef combo that has host Noah Cappe going wild. Other favourites include The Sizzler, the chicken parm'wich and strawberry kettle corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Golden State to Gizzards
programme.desc: Beginning in California and ending in Michigan, Noah Cappe explores creative carnival eats like the jalapeno cheese skirt burger and deep fried gizzards.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Noah's Favs
programme.desc: Noah shares the greatest hits by taking a trip down the memory midway of his favourite carnival foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burger Bonanza
programme.desc: In this episode, Noah Cappe explores the huge variety of options carnival cooks have come up with to honor America's much loved sandwich. From classic beef burgers to exotic meats, buns made from pretzels and even donuts, these burgers will inspire you.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Food Paradise: New 'Cue on the Block
programme.desc: From a smoked Thanksgiving sandwich to barbecued brisket with Mexican flair and a whole hog take on porchetta, chefs across America are finding cool ways to innovate on the grate.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hottest Dogs
programme.desc: From a half-pound kielbasa smothered in Swiss cheese to an all-beef dog stuffed with smoked brisket, these restaurants are all about delicious dogs and sizzling sausages.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Date Night
programme.desc: Laura creates a date-night dinner at home from fresh ingredients, without a hefty price tag. Seared New York Strip steak takes center plate, but no steak dinner is complete without the sides, and no date night complete without flowers.

programme.title: Simply Laura: 15-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Laura has a busy day and only has 15 minutes for each of her meals.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Game Night
programme.desc: Laura Vitale hosts a casual game night. Everyone has a job to do, including Papa Sal, who joins Laura to prepare his spicy steamed mussels. Her guests make their selections from the classic Italian antipasti and enjoy short rib and béchamel lasagna.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Italian Girl in the Garden State
programme.desc: Growing up in Italy, vegetables were the star of Laura Vitale's plates and now, she has recipes to turn local New Jersey veggies into standing ovation dishes.

programme.title: Simply Laura: The Little Black Dress Ingredient
programme.desc: Laura Vitale is on the hunt for a versatile little black dress for upcoming events, and this inspires her to repurpose her dinner plans! She makes marinara sauce her culinary little black dress, accessorizing it in dishes like Italian pot roast.

programme.title: Simply Laura: One-Pot Meals
programme.desc: Laura Vitale creates some comforting one-pot meals for her cousin Kate and her husband, who are adjusting to life with a new baby.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Siesta Fiesta
programme.desc: Bobby may only have a few Spanish words in his repertoire, but when it comes to Spanish cuisine, he's a true aficionado.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Big Easy
programme.desc: Inspired by what he calls one of the greatest food cities in America, Bobby creates a brunch menu that would make New Orleans proud.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay knows that cheese makes everything better, and brunch is no exception. He serves up some cheese-filled dishes like Meyer lemon ricotta crepes with candied almonds, a frittata with thyme roasted potatoes, smoked mozzarella and tomato-basil.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Retro Revamp Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby gives tried-and-true brunch staples a modern makeover with simple techniques and everyday ingredients.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Barbecue in the Big Apple
programme.desc: Michael Symon is joined by his good buddy Michael Strahan at their favorite New York City burger spot. They bounce around The Big Apple dining on meatball sliders, succulent St. Louis style ribs and pastrami-topped pizza.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Kicked-Up Classics
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Memphis with a triple-layered twist on regional dry-rub ribs and a succulent corned beef that's a 30-day labour of love. Then, in Phoenix, classic mac and cheese gets a boozy boost from a special in-house brew.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Michigan to Maize
programme.desc: Noah gets busy with the" Soul on a Roll" sandwich, and the "To Die For" casserole. Salted caramel apple gelato is the thing to beat the heat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Berry Delicious
programme.desc: Berries might be little but they're full of huge flavor, just like the seven berry sweet dishes Noah will be sampling in this episode. Noah will so discover that berries are good on everything.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: This is an episode stuffed with foods that are stuffed. From spicy southern stuffed peppers to a sweet cherry stuffed dessert, Noah will indulge in some of the best stuffed sensations North America has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tacos Del Carnival
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite. Join Noah as he eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos. From a fresh succulent Soft Shell Crab Taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Italiano
programme.desc: Noah tries a clever calzone-Lasagna hybrid and a special pizza and pasta combo.

programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Donald's Fast Food 500/ Mini-Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Flight of the Ninja / Romeo Coaster
programme.desc: Romeo creates a live video game and the PJ Masks must work with the other villains to stop him. After getting separated, Catboy must face his mistakes alone to defeat Night Ninja.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Animal Gets the Sneezies/ Library Leapfrog
programme.desc: When Animal gets a case of the sneezies, he doesn't want to go to the doctor. In preparation for their library trip, Piggy and Summer show Robin all the wonderful places books can take you.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Channel Chasers
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a magic remote control that will allow him to travel through television.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Back to the Norm/ Teeth for Two
programme.desc: Crocker and a genie share a mortal enemy; Jorgen tries to pull Timmy's tooth out.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Finding Emo/ Anchor's Away
programme.desc: Timmy likes a new girl at school. He wishes he was 'emo' and stops caring about everything. Foop and Poof have to take care of an egg for a school project. Foop breaks it and swaps it with a dangerous one.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Love at First Bark / Desperate Without Housewives
programme.desc: Dad forbids Sparky from dating Dinkleberg's new dog. Timmy wishes Dad would like the dog as much as Sparky. When Mom won't stop nagging Timmy and Dad, Timmy wishes all women away for one day.

programme.title: LOL Nick's Ultimate Bloopers Special

programme.desc: The maid of honour is stood up by her boyfriend and befriends the groom's best man. She then has to decide to go back to her old life or pursue a new one.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Safari
programme.desc: When a woman inherits a wildlife reserve in South Africa, she travels there to meet with the head Ranger. Upon learning that the park is in financial jeopardy, and may have to be sold to her uncle's competitor, he urges her to take on a Safari.

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight
programme.desc: After Dwight karate punches Michael, Jim organizes a lunchtime rematch at Dwight's dojo where Pam becomes annoyed when Jim gets too friendly with her.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: The Office: Dwight's Speech
programme.desc: Dunder Mifflin salesman of the year Dwight Schrute must somehow conquer his fear of public speaking before the big convention and turns for help to the worst possible teacher, Michael. As Pam becomes consumed in her wedding plans, Jim plans his escape.

programme.title: The Office: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Michael is surprised when he strikes up a friendship with the five-year-old daughter of his sworn enemy, Toby, on Take Your Daughter to Work Day.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: June 8, 2020

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: The Closer: Half Load
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a former gangbanger that may not have been the target.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Can't Fight This Feeling
programme.desc: A gas tanker explodes on a Seattle highway, causing multiple injuries -- including paramedic Matthew; Meredith and Jo help a frantic mother whose child is suffering from a mysterious illness.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: She's Killing Me
programme.desc: Upon receiving some unsettling news, Meredith and Derek take preventative steps for their children's future; a group of Syrian doctors arrive at Grey Sloan Memorial Hospital for a crash course in basic surgical skills that they plan to apply in the field.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Sleeping Monster
programme.desc: Bailey finds herself at the center of a CDC investigation surrounding the death of several of her patients, as Jackson and the rest of the board members argue over how to address the crisis with the public.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Do You Believe in Magic
programme.desc: The doctors reach out to Bailey but she continues to shut everyone out; after an incident with Ethan’s grandmother, Owen fears the child could end up in foster care.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Readiness Is All
programme.desc: The doctors prepare for a super storm heading towards Seattle. Meanwhile, Owen’s desire to be a parent gets stronger as he becomes closer to Ethan and one wrong move puts the lives of Meredith and her baby in jeopardy.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: The hospital enters crisis mode as the storm rages, resources become scarce and patients flood in by the busload. Meanwhile, one of the doctors fights for his or her life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Death Row Stories
programme.desc: Explore cases that pose hard questions about the U.S. capital punishment system.

programme.title: The Killer Truth
programme.desc: There are two sides to every story, but in a murder, one side dies with the victim. Each episode of 'The Killer Truth' tells the story of a single murder through the five people most intimately connected to the case.

programme.title: The Killer Truth
programme.desc: There are two sides to every story, but in a murder, one side dies with the victim. Each episode of 'The Killer Truth' tells the story of a single murder through the five people most intimately connected to the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seedy Intentions
programme.desc: When a nine-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic’s vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to help them to also find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game

programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: MSO takes on rowdy locals led by fast-talking Tony Yeager. The Outlaws have a history with their competition and are looking to wrap up some unfinished business.

programme.desc: The MSO steps up to the challenge after larger-than-life Chris Block challenges them to switch to small tires and compete against South Carolina. Then, Block comes back with some grudge racers to get another shot at Memphis' money.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: Monte returns to co-captain the Wizard just as a freight train of storms slams the fleet from the south. Jake battles the risk of hauling pots in 30 foot seas to return to his family. Wild Bill drives farther north into the icy Arctic than any other boat.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: As crab turn elusive, veterans Sig Hansen and 'Harley' Davidson form an unlikely alliance, but trust doesn't come easy for old school captains. Freddy pays a price for Keith's decision to haul in intense seas, and Jake tempts fate to become a boat owner.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dark Ship
programme.desc: As smoke fills the Wizard, the Colburns face a dark ship nightmare. Towering breakers shatter Jake's steel anchor forcing him to fight to avoid the rocks of St. Paul Island. Battered by relentless seas Sig turns to family to fill the Northwestern's tanks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Time and Tide Wait for No Man
programme.desc: The bone-breaking winter unleashes its fury on the Summer Bay. A rookie mistake leaves Captain Bill short a hand. Jake hits the jackpot at sea, but forces on land cost him dearly. There's hell to pay when Sean discovers the fatal flaw in his crab count.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Winds put the Wizard on a collision course with a monster. Jake taps a Hillstrand to save the Saga.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Now or Never
programme.desc: An injury requires Coast Guard rescue, and Josh and Casey face a huge loss.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Rivals
programme.desc: A dramatic change in the Russian crab industry rocks global markets and drives new competition between Dutch Harbor captains and their Russian adversaries. As crab prices skyrocket legendary captains return to claim their piece of a historic payday.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Typhoon Hagibis
programme.desc: Jake and Jonathan must make joint decisions when a typhoon strikes. Sig races to make the first offload while repairs have the Cornelia Marie in the eye on the storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Still reeling from deadly typhoon Hagibis, the fleet claws its way back into competition against the Russians. The pressure to make up ground has mounted and it's do-or-die for the captains, even if it means danger or even war.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Shotguns and Fist Fights
programme.desc: Johnathan and Jake blast a shotgun at their problems and a fist fight breaks out on the Seabrooke while Wild Bill blows an engine and Mandy bets on science.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Double Agent
programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie uses U.S. satellites to spy on the Russians, Scott pioneers a dormant fishery and Wild Bill faces off with a Russian greenhorn.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Bleeding Edge
programme.desc: Johnathan finds himself going under the knife at sea as King season comes to an end. Junior chases the elusive Golden King and Wild Bill faces off with a greenhorn.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Never Let Me Go
programme.desc: A distraught Jenny no longer feels at home in India. Deavan struggles during her traditional Korean wedding ceremony. Evelin must decide if she wants to marry Corey. Tiffany worries about Ronald's recovery when she and Daniel leave South Africa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Tell All Part 1
programme.desc: Host Shaun Robinson takes a deep dive with the cast into the details of their most intense and personal moments this season.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Tell All Part 2
programme.desc: Shaun Robinson dives back in to discuss more of the biggest moments with our couples and updates on where their relationships stand now.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Home Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Brittany breaks the news to her father she's moving to Jordan. Jenny tells her daughter she's returning to India for the third time. Kenny sells his house to be with his love in Mexico. Ariela's move to Ethiopia is complicated in more ways than one.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Pillow Talk: Home Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: The couples watch along and provide commentary as they watch.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Before the 90 Days: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Patrick leaves for Paris, while Myriam frets over a secret she has been keeping from him. Paul and Karine's happiness is interrupted by distrust.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Milestones and Meltdowns
programme.desc: It's a week of milestones and meltdowns. The family gets a big van, and their first drive is frightening. The twins graduate from kindergarten, but Bridge has a major fit. Sextuplets turn 6-months, and a group photo shoot turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Five Babies on a Budget
programme.desc: After Danielle confronts Adam about his money-spending ways, they realize they need to make some tough choices to provide for their six girls. They also continue to step up their efforts to get Hazel walking so she can join her sisters in pre-school.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Nightmare on Quint Street
programme.desc: It's Halloween, but before the Busby’s can celebrate the Quints' first trick-or-treat outing, they must race to find costumes, shop for pumpkins and get the new house ready for a Halloween party, all while making a final decision on a $100,000 investment.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing
programme.desc: Profiles four shopaholics who use coupons to save thousands of dollars and amass huge stockpiles of goods. These shoppers dumpster dive for coupons and spend hours a day searching the Internet for deals.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Chris and Joni
programme.desc: With her 'coupontourage' in tow, Joni gets extra food for donating. Chris gets groceries for Feeding America.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Adrienne and Sarah
programme.desc: Alabama minister and couponer Adrienne spreads her love of couponing to her congregation and tries to convert a skeptical friend into a coupon believer. In New Hampshire, 14 year old couponer Sarah controls all of her family's grocery shopping.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Judy and Faatima
programme.desc: Faatima is couponing in order to move her family out of their dangerous neighbourhood in Detroit. Judy uses couponing to help her family and friends.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Desirae and Stephanie
programme.desc: Desirae is so thrifty, she doesn't pay for newspapers and gets her coupons from public recycling bins. Stephanie teaches her son to coupon before sending him off to college.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Zadia and Briana

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dylan and Savenia

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Gemini and Myranda

programme.title: The First 48: Double Life
programme.desc: In Miami, Det. Ricardo John discovers a man stabbed to death behind an abandoned church.

programme.title: After the First 48: Final Investment
programme.desc: When a robbery goes bad in Memphis, one man is left dead with very little physical evidence left at the scene.

programme.title: The First 48: Final Investment/ Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: In Memphis, a well-loved neighbourhood investor is shot, and the only eyewitness is a young girl on her way home from school. Sgt. Mitch Oliver must persuade the girl's mother to let her talk to police. In Miami, a homeless man is murdered.

programme.title: The First 48: Innocent Bystander/ Partners in Crime
programme.desc: A man is stabbed at a strip mall in the middle of the night and surveillance video captures the murder, but it leaves more questions than answers.

programme.title: The First 48: Love Her Madly/ Off Track
programme.desc: In Miami, detectives race to a scene to find the 911 caller covered in blood and a 35-year-old woman brutally stabbed.

programme.title: The First 48: Silenced
programme.desc: Detectives Bob Ermatinger and Ken Penrod investigate the murder of an unidentified woman found shot to death.

programme.title: The First 48: Last Birthday
programme.desc: In Cincinnati, a well-loved 58-year-old man is found shot dead in a hallway. When detectives visit the grief-stricken wife, they learn the victim was murdered a day before his birthday.

programme.title: The First 48: Jacked/ Fallen Idol
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is ambushed at a gas station, and Det. Steve David needs to track him down. Then in Miami, a beloved local rapper is gunned down at his car wash, and detectives suspect it was an inside job.

programme.title: The First 48: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: In Rochester, a man from a neighboring suburb is found shot to death on a city street.

programme.title: The First 48: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: In Cleveland, the murder of an innocent store clerk is caught on tape, and when detectives discover the suspects' violent history, they pull out all the stops to track down the gunmen before more blood is shed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Look Out Below
programme.desc: The Jokers lack hospitality as bumbling bellhops, pitch bizarre inventions to a confused focus group and serve lunch with a side of awkward when they man hot dog stands. Then, the guys reach for the sky to surprise tonight’s big loser.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother-in-Loss
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Murr and Sal are forced to get cheeky with interviewers and explain their lackluster resumes while trying to land a job at a mobile company. The loser witnesses a joining in matrimony that's anything but holy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr head to the Lone Star state in a special episode that proves even embarrassment is bigger in Texas. The city boys from New York whip up trouble teaching cowboy skills on a ranch, then sell Western wear.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: The guys lose sight of social etiquette with strangers in the park, present disastrous timeshare opportunities to future vacationers, and get sneaky with people’s pockets in the grocery store.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.desc: Charlotte and Harry's wedding day arrives and is filled with unexpected mishaps.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Woman's Right to Shoes
programme.desc: Carrie's expensive new shoes go missing when she attends a friend's baby shower.
