programme.title: Sex and the City: The Domino Effect
programme.desc: Big returns to New York for surgery; Miranda introduces Steve to her new love interest.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The One
programme.desc: Carrie is pursued by a famed Russian artist while Miranda admits her feelings to Steve.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: A relationship heats up between Carrie and Petrovsky; Samantha encounters her ex.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Sister City
programme.desc: Leslie hosts the Park and Recreation department's sister city and is surprised by all the differences. Tom becomes an errand boy and April starts playing hard to get.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Kaboom
programme.desc: Leslie, Ann and the rest of the Parks Department volunteer to help the organization KaBOOM build a playground for a neighbouring town. After building an entire playground in one day, Leslie gets frustrated at the lack of progress with the pit.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Greg Pikitis
programme.desc: Leslie enlists the help of Dave and Andy to help her catch a local teen vandal. Ann wants her Halloween party to be fun and gets help from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammy
programme.desc: Leslie learns the library department wants to take over her lot. The library is run by Ron's ex-wife Tammy who has a very strong hold over him still.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Camel
programme.desc: Parks and Recreation worker Leslie Knope is documented by a camera crew while on the job.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Hunting Trip
programme.desc: Leslie tries to prove she can hang with the guys, so she invites herself on Ron's annual hunting trip. Meanwhile, April and Andy bond in the office while everyone is away.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Tom's Divorce
programme.desc: Ron sends Leslie up to the DMV department and she happens to see Tom and Wendy at divorce court. Leslie enlists the help of everyone in the department to take Tom out on the town so he can forget his sadness. Tom has an epiphany about marriage.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Set Up
programme.desc: Ann sets Leslie up on a blind date with a co-worker that does not go as well as Leslie had hoped.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie's House
programme.desc: After an amazing date with Justin, Leslie tries to impress him by hosting a dinner party at her house.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Sweetums
programme.desc: The Parks Department joins forces with a local company to sell energy bars at the park in Pawnee, but Leslie tries to stop the deal when she discovers just how unhealthy the snacks are.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Woman of the Year
programme.desc: Leslie is outraged when Ron wins the 'Woman of the Year' award for a project she started. Tom is desperate to find some money to invest in a local Pawnee club.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Possum
programme.desc: When a possum bites the mayor's dog on a golf course, Leslie is asked to form a task force to catch the pesky animal. Meanwhile, Ron is upset when Mark refuses to bend the rules for him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Park Safety
programme.desc: After Jerry gets mugged by a bunch of kids, Leslie meets with the park rangers in hopes of improving park safety.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Summer Catalog
programme.desc: Leslie decides to take Ron and the past directors of the park on a picnic while she is preparing for the Summer Events Catalogue.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: 94 Meetings
programme.desc: Ron is angry with April when she schedules a ton of meetings for him, while Leslie fights to preserve a historical landmark.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Telethon
programme.desc: Leslie hosts the late-night shift for a local telethon and lands former Indiana Pacer Detlef Schrempf as a celebrity guest.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Master Plan
programme.desc: Leslie is disappointed when her park plans are put on hold by a visit from two state auditors. April has plans for Andy at her birthday party, and Ann is putting together a romantic mystery.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Freddy Spaghetti
programme.desc: Ben prevents Leslie from holding a children's concert so she takes matters into her own hands. Mark makes some big decisions about his life.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Choose Your Budget
programme.desc: Guy's doing something he's never done before: he's letting four chefs choose between three different budgets over three rounds. These culinary combatants quickly realize it's much harder than it looks.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Bold Tastes and Big Laughs
programme.desc: It's a night of memorable characters and mouthwatering food in the market. Chefs have to spellcheck the ingredients for breakfast when Guy plays ABC. Next, competitors keep their eye on the ounces when they're forced to weigh their steakhouse dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cart Wars
programme.desc: The chefs are given the task of making tacos without tortillas, taco seasoning and ground beef. Then, the chefs are challenged to make a sandwich using only frozen food. Finally, the chefs must make a seafood dish with five ingredients or less.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: One-Time Aisle Games
programme.desc: In Flavortown, chefs usually have free reign of the entire market – but tonight, that's all changing when Guy has the chefs cooking meals all night long… but can only shop each aisle ONCE.

programme.title: Big Time Bake: Magic
programme.desc: Four bakers create cookies, cupcakes and a showpiece cake in six hours of nonstop competition. Buddy Valastro judges the action as he and the guest judges visit each kitchen.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: A Dino-Mite Bake!
programme.desc: Duff teams up with the non-profit Magic Wheelchair to create a prehistoric Jurassic World-themed cake, complete with oozing lava and smoke, for two deserving kids and their families at Universal Studios.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: Baked, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: Duff and his team blow it out of the water with a wet-and-wild birthday cake for the Aquarium of the Pacific's one-year-old seal pup. Meanwhile, the pressure is on to make a flock of 21 bird-themed cakes for a deserving group of kids.

programme.title: Chopped: Jump For Bok Choy
programme.desc: An Argentinian meat and something challengingly sweet are two of the appetizer surprises. In round two, the judges are happy to see a favourite seafood selection in the basket, and bok choy also finds its way to their plates.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Racing the Light
programme.desc: As sunlight rapidly diminishes, the Kilchers feel the crunch to get as much done before the winter freeze as possible.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Jewel of Alaska
programme.desc: The Kilcher bonds are put to the test as they attempt to secure enough meat for the coming winter. Atz Senior welcomes a special visitor, his daughter Jewel.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: The Eternal Sun
programme.desc: Solstice has arrived, which means the Kilchers work around the clock to prepare for the big freeze when they'll be isolated and forced to survive only what they've managed to harvest, catch, or kill.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Cow-tastrophe
programme.desc: Wrangling cattle is a dangerous but necessary business out on the frozen edges of Alaska and singer-songwriter Jewel is riding to the rescue to help out an old friend.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Open Season: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Otto and Charlotte's rescue mission to Halibut Cove is quickly put in jeopardy. Atz Lee is burdened by constant pain, but he is able to overcome his struggles on his road to recovery. Meanwhile, Elvin and Eve welcome the newest member of the Kilcher clan.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Risky Restocking
programme.desc: Spring is around the corner and the changing temperatures mean it's time to kick some projects into high gear. In order to complete their tasks, the Kilchers will need to refill their shrinking food supply.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Fish Stocks
programme.desc: As the warm weather dwindles The Kilchers need to make a final push to catch as must fish as possible to fill their reserves to survive the winter.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Open Season: Keeping Kilcher Tradition
programme.desc: In an effort to keep Kilcher tradition alive, August goes on his first-ever deer hunt, while Etienne experiences his first big game hunt. Otto and Charlotte head to Switzerland to discover the family history.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: The 22 Hour Day
programme.desc: Spring is all about action and when there's 22 hours of daylight, the day is filled with necessary tasks to survive the coming winter.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Racing the Light
programme.desc: As sunlight rapidly diminishes, the Kilchers feel the crunch to get as much done before the winter freeze as possible.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Jewel of Alaska
programme.desc: The Kilcher bonds are put to the test as they attempt to secure enough meat for the coming winter. Atz Senior welcomes a special visitor, his daughter Jewel.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: The birth of a little blue penguin becomes causes a sensation at the Bronx Zoo. The veterinary team scrambles to figure out what is wrong with Snowball, a snow leopard. And the exhibits team designs an exhibit for the newly arrived blue iguana.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Sea Lion Pup Grows Up
programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Grumpy Cats' New Digs
programme.desc: Iray, a red ruffed lemur, is rushed to the health center when keepers discover a wound on his leg. A new exhibit is built for the Pallas's cats, the original grumpy cats. Plus, seven adorable baby turtles join the zoo's colony of an endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: Giraffe in the City
programme.desc: A sweet giraffe named Mashengo journeys from the Indiana Zoo to his new home in the Bronx. Keepers hand-raise endangered ducklings and release them onto the duck pond at the Central Park Children's Zoo. Plus, love is in the air for a pair of cloud rats.

programme.title: Movie: House Party 3
programme.desc: After a man becomes engaged to a beautiful girl, he begins to anxiously fear matrimony.

programme.title: Movie: Sparkle

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno

programme.desc: The mystery of the Mediterranean island of Malta lies south of Sicily and is home to megalithic structures. The massive blocks pre-date the Great Pyramid of Giza.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Puma Punku

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Hunt for Atlantis

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Loch Ness

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Nazca

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: We don't yet know where the edge of the universe is or what happens there, but thanks to cutting-edge technology and new discoveries, experts might finally reveal the secrets of the phenomena that can be found in deepest reaches of the cosmos.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Planet of the Metal Aliens
programme.desc: After a strange discovery confirms that life is possible on its surface, scientists begin to investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be home to an alien civilization.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Black Hole Next Door
programme.desc: When astronomers discover a rogue black hole speeding through the Milky Way, they investigate how much danger this cosmic monster poses to Earth, and what would happen if it ever entered our solar system.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hunt for Nazi Treasure
programme.desc: Experts investigate the fate of billions of dollars in gold and artwork that Hitler stole during World War II, and using brand-new discoveries, they might finally locate the whereabouts of the missing Nazi treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Vatican Book of Secrets
programme.desc: The Vatican is home to classified files that could reveal top-secret ties to the Nazis, the Mafia, and extraterrestrials. Using new evidence, experts investigate just what else is hiding in the Vatican's secret archives.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be the burial cloth of Jesus and proof of his existence, but skeptics disagree. Experts investigate this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Occult Conspiracy
programme.desc: As the Nazis waged war for world domination, they began to develop a strange mythology of occult rites and pagan beliefs, and now, experts investigate how far the Nazis may have gone to transform their party into a new, cult-like religion.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Deviant Deeds
programme.desc: A man is hysterical when he finds his brother's girlfriend and roommate beaten with an iron and stabbed to death on the floor. The brothers appear devastated, but the discovery of her missing phone casts doubt on their alibis.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Betrayed: Unholy Alliances
programme.desc: Church secretary Dorothy 'Dot' Finelli, 59, goes missing and turns up dead, as police explore if she's killed by a jealous new Internet date or somebody she's known for years within her own family circle.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Who Killed Katie Autry?
programme.desc: The community of Bowling Green, Kentucky is devastated when a student is assaulted and burned in her college dorm room. After the victim succumbs to her injuries without naming her attacker, police find two suspects with very different stories.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: Betrayed: Unholy Alliances
programme.desc: Church secretary Dorothy 'Dot' Finelli, 59, goes missing and turns up dead, as police explore if she's killed by a jealous new Internet date or somebody she's known for years within her own family circle.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: Who Killed Katie Autry?
programme.desc: The community of Bowling Green, Kentucky is devastated when a student is assaulted and burned in her college dorm room. After the victim succumbs to her injuries without naming her attacker, police find two suspects with very different stories.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Web of Lies: High on Love
programme.desc: High school student Brandon Wentzell falls for blonde beauty Clarissa Chistiakov online. But the course of virtual love doesn't run smooth as the past collides with a toxic present, shattering lives.

programme.title: Web of Lies: California Scheming
programme.desc: After meeting the woman of his dreams online, radio DJ Alan Lee Lama moves over a thousand miles to be with her. When her best friend gets involved, he gets caught up in a bizarre love triangle.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Homicide on the Range
programme.desc: A suspicious disappearance in Virginia piques the interest of authorities, and ignites a multi-jurisdictional investigation. A routine inquiry into the missing man's finances exposes a heartless killer with a checkered past - and a penchant for violence.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Angel of Death
programme.desc: When a jilted lover storms into a provincial police station making wild accusations against her ex, one detective questions the credibility and motives of the wronged woman. But he has no idea just how sinister her secrets are.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Betrayed: Family Fatale
programme.desc: Ruie Ann Park is the J.R. Ewing of Van Buren, AR – wealthy and sharp-tongued, but fair. She rules with her town with wit and flair, until her son's increasingly scandalous lifestyle and others' lust for her money bring her to a bitter, horrific end.

programme.title: Betrayed: Bent on Betrayal
programme.desc: Joan Bent is an 80's working girl. She manages a cleaning staff at a local hotel, and has a loving husband at home. But it can be tough having it all - especially when that includes an enemy with murderous intent in your inner circle.

programme.title: Betrayed: Coed Killer
programme.desc: Angela Samota is every coed's dream come true. She's smart, beautiful, and always the epicenter of every room she enters - but one day she's noticed by the wrong person, and it leads to her ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: Outgoing Jackie Galloway is found strangled and bound with ritualistic knots. Police investigate suspects in her inner circle but are shocked when a chance encounter with a prowler leads them to discover the murderer is a budding serial killer.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Fiesta de Laguna
programme.desc: It's fiesta time as pool designer Lucas Congdon and his crew are challenged to create a Mexican resort in a Venice, Florida residential backyard. Lucas encounters several design 'firsts' on his journey to infuse the flavors of Mexico into his creation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Most Unique Builds
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters unveil their top 10 'Most Unique Builds' from the show.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Most Unique Builds
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters unveil their top 10 'Most Unique Builds' from the show.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: She's a Brick House
programme.desc: Poison ivy, broken windows and a cramped patio are just a few items that need to be addressed if this couple wants to turn their home into the haven it was nearly two decades ago. Chris and Sara refresh the home with a low-maintenance design.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Jokin' Around in Georgia
programme.desc: Homeowners use their own skills to turn a disaster house into a high-dollar flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Craziest Flipping Fails
programme.desc: There are a million things that can go wrong for first-time flippers. These newbies learn the hard way that one should never underestimate the difficulty or safety of a routine renovation.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: DIY or Die
programme.desc: Megan and Sarah run a DIY blog and workshop, but they've decided to take their projects to the next level: flipping a house. These girls may have an eye for design, but they have a lot to learn about construction.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Best Flip Ever
programme.desc: With plenty of preparation, smart design choices and a little hard work, savvy flippers who know what buyers want create stunning homes by making dynamic and jaw-dropping renovations.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Move That Kitchen
programme.desc: Tamara renovates a single-story ranch and tackles her biggest challenge to date, transforming the former master bedroom into a stunning, open kitchen. However, she and her dad run into problems during demolition.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Lafayette, Louisiana
programme.desc: Casey Webb's food fling finds him in Lafayette, La., for savoury Cajun stew and a stuffed and spicy sandwich specialty. He also accepts the Devil's Bowl Challenge- a scorching-hot bowl of ramen.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Good Eats: Right on Q
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown for a journey into the world of home-made, tasty, smoked, pork.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Steaks: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show on 'budget' steaks with new ways of cooking his favourite: top sirloin steak. Then there's a close look at why we 'flip' meat and a new angle on the broiler.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Carnivore's Delight
programme.desc: We're giving into our carnivorous cravings and sharing our favourite meat from menus all over the country. Bobby Flay, Ted Allen, Alex Guarnaschelli and Cat Cora bring the finest duck chicken, pork and beef.

programme.title: Amy Schumer Learns to Cook: Taco Night and Movie Night
programme.desc: Amy and Chris get ready for taco night. Chris teaches Amy how to make tempura-battered fish tacos with guacamole with pea shoots and rice, and Amy sets out to make a Paloma. Chris then teaches Amy how to make movie night noshes like crispy potatoes.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Fiesta Time
programme.desc: Take a trip south of the border to look at Mexico's classic dishes.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Mambo Italiano
programme.desc: Italy has given us many of Food's Greatest Hits, and we give a great big "grazie" with three Italian delicacies. The journey begins with delicious pizza, then we dive head first into spaghetti and meatballs and we finish it all off with cannoli.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Snack Attack
programme.desc: Come spoil your dinner with us as we attack some of food's greatest snacks deep-fried bites, chips and dip, plus everyone's fave, popcorn.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Super Sandwiches
programme.desc: Three hundred million of these are eaten every day in America and we celebrates the greatest thing since sliced bread, the sandwich. We tip our cap to the Earl of Sandwich as we look at the po boy, the Philly cheesesteak and the ice cream sandwich.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Get Stuffed
programme.desc: Why eat simple and boring food when you can have food that is stuffed with more food.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Southern Comfort
programme.desc: For good old-fashioned Southern comfort, it doesn't get much better than hearty portions of home-style favorites. Food's Greatest Hits serves up three down-home dishes that will bring the country right to you.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics I: Spinach Salad
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown examines spinach salad recipes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Corn the Beef
programme.desc: Alton makes traditional corned beef that would rival any New York City deli.

programme.title: Good Eats: Milk Made
programme.desc: Join Alton Brown as he dips into the liquid miracle that is milk, in search of its secrets, history, and whether or not it's safe to drink straight from the source.

programme.title: Good Eats: Coconut Cake Revival
programme.desc: Host Alton Brown wants to know if it's possible to make a great cake with coconut from a can and he's willing to crack open as many nuts as it takes to make a slice of paradise on a plate.

programme.title: Good Eats: Sub Standards
programme.desc: Alton Brown and a handful of substitute chefs as they take on a few good recipes with one ingredient tied behind their backs.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fishing Whole
programme.desc: Confront your phobias as the fearless host roasts, planks and fries up some fish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Withering Bites
programme.desc: Dried fruit may not be glamorous, but what it lacks in fashion, it more than makes up for in flavor and versatility. Before your good fruit goes bad, take a tip from host Alton Brown and dry it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Kinda Blue (Blueberry)
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the secrets to turning the blueberry into a year-round treat.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Smoked
programme.desc: Roger Mooking criss-crosses America to count down 15 of the very best steaks, wings, Reubens and more- all made even better with glorious smoke. From salt-cured country ham to smoked fish chowder, bacon bourbon rib-eye steak to smoky s'mores pancakes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Surf And Turf

programme.desc: It's the first 'Pit Stop and Go Rally' where pit crews compete against each other. The Happy Helpers look after Clara Cluck's farm while she's out of town.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Desert Pups/ Okavango Odyssey
programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Chiseling Chiselers / A Patchwork Mystery
programme.desc: When the royal sword goes missing, Mira agrees to help Veer find it. Then, when a tapestry that Priya created for Jalpur's anniversary celebration winds up nowhere to be found, Mira sets out on the case to find it before the party begins.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night at the Nursery/ Seas the Day
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Give 'Em the Boot / Tik Tok, Broken Clock
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fastest Flier / Best Friends Wherever
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach Ava that there is more to a delivery than speed. When Mia can't say goodbye to her friend, Chloe, the Junior Fliers show her that they can keep in touch!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Animal Antics/ Here, Kitty, Kitty, Kitty!
programme.desc: The gang converts their roadsters into their favorite animals; Heist's kitty runs away.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Wolfy Plan/ The Lizard Theft
programme.desc: Rip tries to gather feathers from Owlette's wings to let the Wolfies fly.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Bluey: Early Baby / Hospital / Daddy Putdown
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy come into conflict; Dad is admitted to an imaginary hospital; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Win a Twin/ Skeeter and the Super Girls
programme.desc: When Skeeter volunteers to help Miss Nanny bake, her twin, Scooter, isn't sure he can have fun playing without her. Then, Skeeter is excited to save the day with Super Fabulous and Captain Ice Cube, but doesn't think she can be a superhero with glasses.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Cat Sitter/ Addicted
programme.desc: Theodore gets stuck taking care of Miss Croner's cats during the week. Dave wants the boys to focus only on school. The Chipettes challenge the Chipmunks to go three hours without their favorite things.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Great Chipmunk Detective/ Guitar Hero
programme.desc: When Miss Miller gets robbed, Eleanor and Theodore promise to find the culprit and bring them to justice. Alvin begrudgingly agrees to teach Miss Smith guitar, but she won't reveal why she so desperately needs to learn.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Spoiler-Itis/ Something's Fishy
programme.desc: When Alvin is accused of revealing spoilers for everyone's favorite TV show, he agrees not to speak for 24 hours. Alvin and Simon think Theodore's pet goldfish has died.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lost in Space...Camp/ Super Hot Chocolate
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dog Gone
programme.desc: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad's life miserable at work.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Let Sleeper Dogs Lie/ Cat-astrophe
programme.desc: Crocker tries to trigger Sparky with a secret word. Catman confuses Sparky for his old arch-nemesis Dogman.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Young Dylan arrives at his relatives' home needing a place to live, but his streetwise swagger upends the conservative Wilson household.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Odd Fairy Tales
programme.desc: In order to put a restless Poof to sleep, Wanda decides to read him a book of fairy tales.

programme.title: The Loud House: Patching Things Up/ Cheater by the Dozen

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Day Without Tears/ Summer Job
programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Fish in Town/ Love That Squid

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Trouble / The Way of the Sponge

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Are You Happy Now?/ Planet of the Jellyfish

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Visit From Little Sven
programme.desc: Rose's cousin Sven, arrives in Miami for a visit just prior to him being married by arrangement. However, when Blanche plays a trick on her latest beau, which involves Sven, the naive groom falls for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Educating Doug
programme.desc: Doug is out of his league when Carrie signs them up for an English literature class.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Road Rayge
programme.desc: Doug loses his license when he is coerced into cheating on the driver's test.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Supermarket Story
programme.desc: Doug, Carrie and Arthur endure chaos when they go shopping the day before Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Noel Cowards
programme.desc: When their car breaks down, Doug and Carrie realize they will have to buy a new one.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Much to Doug's dismay, Carrie insists that his friend Spence needs a woman in his life.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Best Man
programme.desc: Doug attends a wedding after discovering that Carrie and the groom were once lovers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dog Days
programme.desc: The neighbour's dog barks at night, keeping Doug and Carrie awake.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Crappy Birthday
programme.desc: Carrie is so depressed about turning 30 that she doesn't even want to go out.

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'ain't Valentine
programme.desc: Carrie forces her father, Arthur, to attend a seniors Valentine's Day dance.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Court Date
programme.desc: Carrie gets a ticket and Doug suggests that she go out on a date with the policeman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: White Collar
programme.desc: When the shift supervisor at work suddenly dies, Doug gets his job and Carrie is thrilled.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Into the Red
programme.desc: Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to form an alliance with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into Russian waters for golden crab and Josh bets it all on a gut feeling. Later, Wild Bill turns to his last resort and seeks work in Russia.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Mayday: Scandies Rose
programme.desc: As winter slams the fleet, the Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call while captains and crew brace for the loss of friends. The clock is ticking on the cod derby for Wild Bill and Junior, while Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard at the Russian line.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Mayday: Scandies Rose
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call as winter slams the fleet. Wild Bill and Junior race the clock during a cod derby and Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard near the Russian line.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Cold War Heating Up
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Sig and Mandy go dark ship in towering seas. Jake's new deckhand gets injured while Junior attempts to steam through False Pass in a nighttime blizzard.

programme.title: OWN Spotlight: Where Do We Go From Here?: Part 1
programme.desc: Oprah speaks directly with Black leaders offering insight and tangible plans to answer the questions 'What matters now?' 'What matters next?' and 'Where do we go from here'?

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Legend of Wild Bill
programme.desc: While coping with a fractured relationship with his son, Wild Bill rushes to convert his two million dollar investment into a commercial crabber before the season begins.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legend of Jake Anderson
programme.desc: Against all odds, Jake Anderson fought his way back from addiction to become a captain. Now he has just two weeks to pull off another miracle, reviving his battered boat in shipyard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Legend of Wild Bill

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Legend of Jake Anderson
programme.desc: Against all odds, Jake Anderson fought his way back from addiction to become a captain. Now he has just two weeks to pull off another miracle, reviving his battered boat in shipyard.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Desert
programme.desc: The ancient city of Petra, a city carved from desert rock, has baffled experts for decades. Now, new technologies resurrect the city and reveal why the spectacular civilization was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of the Colosseum
programme.desc: New evidence uncovers the ancient mysteries behind the iconic Colosseum. Archaeologists uncover the secret lives of the gladiators and make new discoveries that help explain the rise and sudden fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Blood Pyramids
programme.desc: Giant pyramids at a strange site in Mexico are revealing the bloody secrets of a mysterious civilization that vanished 1,400 years ago. Little is known about this lost culture, but new discoveries are uncovering shocking evidence of human sacrifice.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tut's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: New discoveries explore the dark secrets of Tutankhamun's tomb. Archaeologists are finally finding answers to its ancient riddles, showing how his untimely death, his calamitous burial, and an act of God made a minor king the most famous of them all.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of Egypt's Mega Temple
programme.desc: The Egyptian mega-temple at Karnak was once the political powerbase of the ancient pharaohs and the home to strange religious rituals. New discoveries of skeletons tell a story of jealousy, betrayal, and the rise of a new religion that changed Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Examine new discoveries which are revealing the deepest and darkest secrets of Stonehenge, showing how ancient magic, bizarre rituals, and brutal murder built this strange monument.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Treasures of the Terracotta Army
programme.desc: The Terracotta Army is one of China's greatest treasures, but there are still dark secrets surrounding this super-tomb. Newly discovered artifacts reveal the soldiers' supernatural enemy, and human remains point to ancient China's violent origins.

programme.title: Unearthed: Sex, Lies, and the Taj Mahal
programme.desc: The Taj Mahal is one of the world's most beautiful monuments, but new investigations reveal its dark secrets. Scientists are uncovering codes that tell a shocking story of power and betrayal, challenging everything we thought we knew about the Taj Mahal.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: World's 8th Wonder
programme.desc: Josh is on the trail from Russia to Germany in search of history's most expensive stolen object, the Amber Chamber. Retracing the steps of Nazi soldiers, Josh explores abandoned Nazi bunkers and a hazardous German mine.

programme.desc: As babies arrive, life gets more complicated for the families. Nicole makes a controversial announcement.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: The New Normal

programme.desc: Courtney and Eric stress about hosting a big 5K charity event, while also making sure the six babies stay on track developmentally. Major decisions need to be made, knowing Courtney's maternity leave pay is ending and they may be losing their nanny soon.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Thanksgiving Miracle
programme.desc: Adam and Danielle decide to host twenty people but soon realize they have bitten off more than they can chew. Meanwhile, Hazel has a major breakthrough and Adam and Danielle push Mimi to consider apartment living.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: In Sickness and in Wealth
programme.desc: Extreme Cheapskates Karen and Barry cannot stand the idea of spending money. Whether it's frying breakfast on the car engine or pulling out their own tooth at home, no task is too big and no savings too small.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Tara's Story
programme.desc: Tara is a mother of two from Lafayette, Louisiana. Addicted to food, she is too ashamed of her size to be seen with her kids, confining herself indoors. Now seeking gastric bypass, Tara is committed to regaining her confidence and being a proud mother.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Marla's Story
programme.desc: Marla is so heavy she cannot stand up. Bedridden, her true weight is unknown but estimated at 800 pounds. Marla must face the facts about her health and the toll it takes on her supportive family if she is to save her health.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Michael's Story
programme.desc: Michael's massive 632lb body has left this husband and father dependent upon his family. If he doesn't learn to control his anger issues around food, lose weight, and address the root of his issues, then he will remain in jeopardy of losing everything.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Megan's Story
programme.desc: At 24 years old and over 600 lbs, Megan lives at home with her mom, who cooks for her since Megan can't do much on her own. Now, Megan must travel to Houston to meet Dr. Now and change her eating habit or her life may end before it ever begins.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Infiniti and Dave
programme.desc: 19-year-old dancer Infiniti wants Nev and Max to help her find out if her online love is real. What the pair uncover is far shadier than either of them had ever imagined.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sunny and Jamison
programme.desc: Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams, but she and Jamison have never met.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff and Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms and Jeff is ready to find out if Megan is who she says she is.

programme.title: Teen Mom: At Home: Cory and Taylor’s Baby Special
programme.desc: Cory and Taylor self-shoot their journey to become parents during Taylor's last few weeks of pregnancy, the delivery of their daughter, and bringing an infant home while California is under a shelter in place order due to COVID-19.

programme.title: True Life: First Time First Responder
programme.desc: With New York City under siege from the COVID-19 pandemic, MTV follows a team of millennial volunteer first responders as they self-document their lives during their first high -risk EMT shift.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mike Holston
